requirement_topic.en: ESDM energy label permission and model registration
requirement_topic.zh: ESDM节能标签许可与型号备案
requirement_topic.zht: ESDM節能標籤許可與型號備案

summary.en: The Indonesia market requires refrigerators to have valid energy label permission tied to the submitted model registration data. The label is treated as a condition of market readiness and may block customs release and domestic sale if missing or inconsistent with approved class and declared capacity class.
summary.zh: 印尼市场要求家用冰箱在模型提交并备案后具备有效节能标签许可。若标签缺失或与已备案机型等级、容积等级不一致，通常会影响清关和入市。
summary.zht: 印尼市場要求家用冰箱在型號提交並備案後具備有效節能標籤許可。若標籤缺失或與已備案機型等級、容積等級不一致，通常會影響清關和入市。

standards_or_laws: Kementerian ESDM appliance energy label policy and enforcement guidance

summary.en: China domestic label permission uses China-specific templates and declaration channels and is generally assessed against domestic sales channels rather than Indonesia market files.
summary.zh: 中国国内标签许可使用中国特有模板和申报路径，评估口径通常面向中国市场销售而非印尼进口文件。
summary.zht: 中國國內標籤許可使用中國特有模板和申報路徑，評估口徑通常面向中國市場銷售而非印尼進口文件。

standards_or_laws: China residential appliance energy label rules
GB energy efficiency disclosure standards for domestic appliance sales

gap.en: Exporters can reuse test data in principle but must create an Indonesia-facing label package with approved wording, local language format, and model-specific class mapping before shipment or warehousing.
gap.zh: 出口商原则上可复用检测数据，但在出货/入仓前必须建立面向印尼的标签文件，包括批准用语、本地语言格式及型号级别匹配。
gap.zht: 出口商原則上可複用檢測數據，但在出貨/入倉前必須建立面向印尼的標籤文件，包括批准用語、本地語言格式及型號級別匹配。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when the refrigerator product family is required to carry label under ESDM labeling controls.
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic labeling remains separate and does not replace Indonesia permission conditions.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare a model-specific energy-label package once, in the Indonesian language format required by local authorities, and reconcile class boundaries with the exact sold variant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按印尼主管机关所需语言格式生成型号级节能标签包，并将标签等级与实际销售变型逐一匹配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按印尼主管機關所需語言格式生成型號級節能標籤包，並將標籤等級與實際銷售變型逐一匹配。

requirement_topic.en: Minimum energy performance thresholds (MEPS) for refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: 家用电冰箱最小能效水平（MEPS）
requirement_topic.zht: 家用電冰箱最小能效水平（MEPS）

summary.en: Indonesia applies minimum-efficiency expectations for listed household appliances, and non-compliant units can be stopped from customs release or distributor stocking where national controls are applied at inspection points or through ministry coordination.
summary.zh: 印尼对列入清单的家用器具实施最小能效水平要求，在检查点或与主管部门联动抽查时，不符合能效条件的机型可被拒绝清关或禁止经销入库。
summary.zht: 印尼對列入名單的家用器具實施最小能效水平要求，在檢查點或與主管部門聯動抽查時，不符合能效條件的機型可被拒絕清關或禁止經銷入庫。

standards_or_laws: ESDM energy efficiency and appliance-label framework under national energy conservation governance
Ministry-level implementing rules for minimum energy performance levels in household appliances

summary.en: China market access can also rely on domestic performance classes and standards, but equivalence depends on class mappings and declared capacities. A China MEPS result does not automatically satisfy Indonesian minimum class thresholds.
summary.zh: 中国也按本土性能级别实施能效控制，但是否满足印尼最低门槛要看等级映射和容积声明。中国MEPS结果不能自动等同印尼标准阈值。
summary.zht: 中國也按本土性能級別實施能效控制，但是否滿足印尼最低門檻要看等級映射和容積宣告。中國MEPS結果不能自動等同印尼標準門檻。

standards_or_laws: China appliance efficiency class framework for domestic market
GB test and class basis for Chinese refrigeration products

gap.en: Map each Indonesian declared capacity segment and operating variant to the imported configuration before filing; if only a China class is available, obtain Indonesia-facing mapping evidence or request regulator clarification.
gap.zh: 在报备前需逐一将印尼申报的容量段和运行变型映射到出口配置。若仅有中国能效等级，应补充印尼对应映射证据或向主管机关确认。
gap.zht: 在報備前需逐一將印尼申報的容量段和運行變型映射到出口配置。若僅有中國能效等級，應補充印尼對應映射證據或向主管機關確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where national inspection or distribution readiness requires MEPS-level compliance for the model category.
mandatory_status.cn: China internal MEPS documentation is separate and does not replace Indonesia minimum-performance filing requirements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Reconfirm MEPS compliance using Indonesian declared categories and do not rely on domestic Chinese classing for final clearance decisions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 使用印尼申报类别复核MEPS合规性，不应当以中国国内分类直接作最终放行决定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 使用印尼申報類別複核MEPS合規性，不應以中國國內分類直接作為最終放行決定。
